eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 9:34 AM on MAY 1, 2019 Effective until 9:49 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lyon County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Lyon, Carson City, Douglas, Storey, Alpine County.  This is only a test. No action required
